title: Better Mob Models
description: Visual overhauls of a few mobs that need improvement!
body:
This resource pack requires Optifine Better Mob Models will overhaul various Minecraft mobs with new art and animations to make your world more visually exciting :D While the resource pack only changes 4 mobs at the moment, we plan on updating it in the future, so feel free to suggest mobs you'd like to see re designed! Josh/Joosh - Art
GogoMines - Creating the resource pack
[Winter Overhaul mod](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/winter-overhaul) A mod that overhauls the vanilla snowy biomes!
[Creatures and Beasts mod](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creatures-and-beasts) A mod that adds amazing creatures into Minecraft!
[Creeper Overhaul mod](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul) A mod that overhauls the vanilla creepers!
[Nightlights](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/nightlights) A mod that adds a variety of new light sources to Minecraft!
